title: Docker Compose Production Blueprints Skill
copyText:
Install:
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/docker-compose-production-blueprints.zip -o docker-compose-production-blueprints.zip && unzip -o docker-compose-production-blueprints.zip -d ./docker-compose-production-blueprints

Usage:
Use this skill when you need Docker Compose environments that are stable, secure, and easy to operate.

Asset:
# Trigger
"Apply the Docker Compose production blueprints skill to this stack."

# Required output
1) Compose service topology
2) Security and secret handling plan
3) Healthcheck and startup dependency map
4) Update/rollback procedure
